title: FG_IO_CheckInputStatus Property
description:
This property sets the determination conditions of the end conditions related to I/O.

It is used when IOCheckEnabled is True.

According to the bit specified by IOCheckInputBit, it is determine as the end conditions are satisfied.

Values

Off When the input bit is OFF (0), it is determined as the end conditions are satisfied.

On When the input bit is ON (1), it is determined as the end conditions are satisfied.

Default: Off

See Also: IOCheckInputStatus Property

IOCheckInputBit Property
see_also:
Applies To

Relax Object, FollowMove Object, Press Object
